cubic_level_instructions:
WELCOME! 

Here's how to interact with the object:
   • Spin the object by clicking and dragging.
   • Click on a surface to open the corresponding workspace.
   • Hover over the focused octahedron to view the short and long descriptions of the surface.
   • Use the "Insert Files" button to add files.
   • Click "Save" to save your changes.
   • Hover over the buttons in the bottom right to discover what simulations and evaluations you can create.
   • Click the "XLSX" grid button in the bottom right corner to view your data in a spreadsheet format.
   • Click the "Download" button in the bottom right corner to download the data and uploaded files.
tooltip_short_desc_click: View the short description / questions for this surface.
tooltip_long_desc_click: View the long, detailed description of this surface.
tooltip_ai_short_click: Generate an AI-aided short description for this surface.
tooltip_ai_long_click: Generate an AI-aided long description for this surface.
validation_subtitle: Checks length automatically and uses AI to review fit and consistency.
ai_locked_msg: This AI generator has been locked by the admin.
ai_short_query_placeholder: Enter a query to generate a short description…
ai_long_query_placeholder: Enter a query to generate a long description…
share_link_msg: Anyone logged in can open this link to run a simulation, generate a video, or evaluate the consistency of your data.
clear_confirm_msg: Do you want to delete all of your cosmos and interaction log data?
evaluate_tooltip: Evaluate your entries for consistency and suggestions
simulate_tooltip: Generate a textual simulation of your data
video_tooltip: Generate a video animation using your data
share_tooltip: Generate a link to share your simulation & animation
clear_tooltip: Delete all cosmos and interaction log data
